functions.name: balanceOf
functions.description: Returns the token balance of an address.

inputs.name: account
inputs.description: Address to query the balance of.

functions.name: allowance
functions.description: Returns the remaining number of tokens that spender will be allowed to spend on behalf of owner.

functions.name: totalSupply
functions.description: Returns the total token supply in circulation.

functions.name: decimals
functions.description: Number of decimals used to format token amounts.

functions.name: transfer
functions.description: Moves `amount` tokens from the caller’s account to `recipient`.

functions.name: approve
functions.description: Sets `amount` as the allowance of `spender` over the caller’s tokens.

functions.name: transferFrom
functions.description: Move tokens between accounts using a prior allowance.

events.name: Transfer
events.signature: Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

events.name: Approval
events.signature: Approval(address indexed owner, address indexed spender, uint256 value)
